_note: Baselines the QA KB was last verified against. The maintenance agent diffs each repo's track_branch HEAD against built_from_sha to find changes, then bumps these values in its PR. If built_from_sha is NOT an ancestor of track_branch HEAD (e.g. a feature-branch baseline), the agent falls back to a time-window diff and treats that repo's docs as full re-verify. A null built_from_sha means the repo was just added to tracking — the first refresh full-verifies its docs, then records a real SHA.
